name: akm-cli
description: akm (Agent Knowledge Management) — A package manager for AI agent skills, commands, tools, and knowledge. Works with Claude Code, OpenCode, Cursor, and any AI coding assistant.

pinNotes.@opencode-ai/sdk@1.2.20: Exact pin. The SDK surface we use (createOpencode + session.create/prompt/delete in src/integrations/agent/sdk-runner.ts) is stable across 1.x, but the SDK has shipped 5+ minor versions of unrelated provider/registry churn. akm-cli is a global CLI install so the pin is isolated from user-project deps. Re-test sdk-runner before bumping.

scripts.preinstall:
node -e "var ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'';var major=parseInt((process.versions.node||'0').split('.')[0],10);if(process.versions.bun||ua.startsWith('bun/')||process.env.BUN_INSTALL||major>=20){process.exit(0)}console.error('
  ERROR: akm-cli requires the Bun runtime (https://bun.sh), Node.js >= 20, or the prebuilt binary.
  Install options:
    1. Bun:    curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash  &&  bun install -g akm-cli
    2. Binary: curl -fsSL https://github.com/itlackey/akm/releases/latest/download/install.sh | bash
');process.exit(1)"
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun scripts/gen-config-schema.ts &&bun run tsc --project ./tsconfig.build.json && bun scripts/copy-assets.ts && bun scripts/fix-esm-extensions.ts
scripts.check: bun run lint && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration
scripts.check:fast: bun run lint && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun run test:unit
scripts.check:changed: bun test tests/output-baseline.test.ts tests/integration/e2e.test.ts tests/stash-search.test.ts && bun run lint && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.test:unit:shard: bun run sweep:tmp && bun test --parallel=1 --timeout=30000 ./tests --path-ignore-patterns=tests/integration --shard=${SHARD:?set SHARD=k/N}
scripts.test:integration:shard: bun run sweep:tmp && bun test --parallel=1 --timeout=30000 ./tests/integration ./tests/commands ./tests/workflows --shard=${SHARD:?set SHARD=k/N}
scripts.lint: bunx biome check src/ tests/ && bun scripts/lint-tests-isolation.ts && bun scripts/lint-license-headers.ts && bun scripts/lint-runtime-boundary.ts
